---
title: Shelf
date: '2026-02-18'
description: My Personal Reading Journal
categories:
- Creative
- Data Science
featured: true
icon: books
---

[See Journal](https://noahweidig.com/shelf/){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A collection of the books I've read, am currently reading, and hope to read—along with my thoughts, ratings, favorite quotes, and takeaways.
